  "findings": [
    "The staged personal protective equipment (PPE) has an arc-flash rating below the required task category specified by the equipment label and documentation."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately before any electrical exposure occurs.",
    "Remove the under-rated PPE from the work area.",
    "Procure and verify PPE that meets or exceeds the required arc-flash boundary and calorie rating (cal/cm²) specified for the task."
  ],
  "rationale": "Staging PPE with an arc-flash rating below the required task category is a critical safety violation. If work begins, the technician faces severe burn or fatality risks from a potential arc-flash event. The PPE must be replaced with correctly rated gear before work can proceed.",
  "references": [
    "NFPA 70E Article 130",
    "OSHA 1910.335"
  ]
}
